column6: We are looking for a Junior Data Analyst with strong SQL, Excel, and Python skills. The candidate should support dashboarding, data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and stakeholder communication. Experience with Power BI or Tableau is a plus.

We are seeking a Junior Data Scientist who can work with Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, statistics, regression, classification, feature engineering, and model evaluation. Good documentation and communication skills are important.
The role involves building machine learning pipelines using Python, Scikit-learn, Docker, MLflow, CI/CD, and model deployment. Knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure is helpful.

We are hiring a Data Engineer to build ETL workflows, data pipelines, SQL transformations, data warehousing models, and documentation. Experience with Airflow, Spark, dbt, or cloud platforms is beneficial.

We are looking for an Applied AI Engineer with Python, natural language processing, large language models, prompt engineering, embeddings, retrieval-augmented generation, and strong problem solving skills.
